refined_obligation: extract terminal composition closure content from RestrictedCompositionTarget
target_content: terminal composition closure content needed for a restricted-only ZeroDayClosure edge
positive_claim: refines the first downstream edge obligation without constructing the RestrictedCompositionTarget -> ZeroDayClosure edge
missing_object: actual extraction witness from RestrictedCompositionTarget to terminal composition closure content
blocked_promotions: unconditional closure from terminal composition content
non_claims: does not extract terminal composition closure content
does not construct an unrestricted zero-day closure
does not erase the restricted boundary
does not prove the restricted-to-unrestricted lift
does not add SNOLAB or external empirical evidence
next_weakest_point: Identify the exact fields of RestrictedCompositionTarget needed before any extraction witness can be attempted.
